title: NSO - Naruto Storm Online
description: Naruto modpack designed for use on the Naruto Storm Online server. This modpack is not compatible with Singleplayer or LAN.
body:
Naruto modpack designed for use on the Naruto Storm Online server.

**Naruto Storm Online** is the ultimate Naruto-themed server where you'll experience a **unique mod**, a **party system** for **boss battles**, **village creation**, **tailed beast collecting**, and more. Join forces with fellow players to face challenging bosses, create and lead your village, and **collect all 9 tailed beasts to unlock the legendary Juubi**. Get ready for an immersive Naruto adventure like no other – join us now and become a part of the ninja world in Naruto Storm Online!

![Logo NSO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f16495d4106742b2d51a817951135fe8931cb09.png)

This Modpack include some mods that aren't on Modrinth:

[Armourers Workshop](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/armourers-workshop)

[Camera Mod (Shoulder Surfing)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/shoulder-surfing-reloaded)

[Damage Indicators](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/damage-indicators-mod)

[Bibliocraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bibliocraft)

The **Naruto Storm Online Mod** is a mod designed for use with the Naruto Storm Online Server. Developed by its creator, Kravy, the mod introduces various features and resources tailored to be used on the server's gameplay experience. Notably, it is optimized for multiplayer usage and will encounter countless compatibility issues when used in single-player mode.
